mapper.sql: e.id, e.offering_id, e.student_id, e.enrollment_status, e.select_time, e.drop_time, e.remark, e.deleted, e.create_time, e.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, c.course_code, c.course_name, o.academic_year, o.semester, o.teacher_name, o.class_time, o.classroom, o.offering_status

FROM teaching_course_enrollment e INNER JOIN teaching_course_offering o ON o.id=e.offering_id AND o.deleted=0 INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0 INNER JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=e.student_id AND sp.deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_course_enrollment (offering_id, student_id, enrollment_status, select_time, remark) VALUES (#{offeringId}, #{studentId}, #{enrollmentStatus}, #{selectTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE teaching_course_enrollment SET enrollment_status='SELECTED', select_time=NOW(), drop_time=NULL, deleted=0, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE teaching_course_enrollment SET enrollment_status='DROPPED', drop_time=NOW(), update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT WHERE e.offering_id=#{offeringId} AND e.student_id=#{studentId} AND e.deleted=0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
ORDER BY e.create_time DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT WHERE e.student_id=#{studentId} AND e.deleted=0 ORDER BY e.create_time DESC, e.id DESC
SELECT WHERE e.offering_id=#{offeringId} AND e.enrollment_status='SELECTED' AND e.deleted=0 ORDER BY sp.student_no ASC
